strengths: Exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with ~19 years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform running on Kubernetes
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale — current AI work is recent and tooling-level
No evidence of director-level scope: career is senior/staff IC delivery roles, not organization-wide technical strategy or advising strategic customers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products

response.justification: The role's core competencies are recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, and director-level influence. The candidate clears the minimum bar: ~19 years of engineering experience (2006-present), a Bachelor's in Computer Science, and founder experience with GISCollective satisfies the entrepreneurial preference. However, the strongest AI evidence is contributing to MCP code generators at re:cinq since April 2025 — genuine but early-stage and not the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms' the role requires. There is also no résumé evidence of advising strategic customers, setting product strategy, or leading through influence at director scope; speaking history (FOSS4G 2019, workshops) shows knowledge sharing but at a practitioner level. Strong senior/staff engineer, but the gap to a Principal AI-strategy role is substantial.
